summary: Iteration 50 - ForgotPasswordPage and ResetPasswordPage responsive testing complete. Verified mobile-first design on both pages with mobile (390px) and desktop (1920px) viewports. All responsive features working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: ForgotPasswordPage.js: Mobile-first responsive design correctly implemented with md: breakpoint classes
ForgotPasswordPage.js: Mobile header with back button (data-testid='mobile-back-btn') and title 'Recuperar Contraseña'
ForgotPasswordPage.js: Mail icon centered in w-14 h-14 bg-stone-100 container (md:hidden)
ForgotPasswordPage.js: Email input has h-12 md:h-10 for touch-friendly mobile height
ForgotPasswordPage.js: Submit button has rounded-full h-12 md:h-11 classes
ForgotPasswordPage.js: Desktop 'Volver al Login' link has 'hidden md:inline-flex' classes
ForgotPasswordPage.js: Footer wrapped in 'hidden md:block' - correctly hidden on mobile
ResetPasswordPage.js: Three states implemented - invalid token, form, success
ResetPasswordPage.js: Invalid token state shows red AlertCircle icon in bg-red-100 container
ResetPasswordPage.js: 'Solicitar nuevo enlace' button links to /forgot-password
ResetPasswordPage.js: Form state has 2 password inputs with h-12 md:h-10 heights
ResetPasswordPage.js: Toggle password button (data-testid='toggle-password-btn') with Eye/EyeOff icons
ResetPasswordPage.js: 'Mínimo 8 caracteres' hint displayed below password input
ResetPasswordPage.js: Lock icon centered in w-14 h-14 bg-stone-100 container (md:hidden)
ResetPasswordPage.js: All buttons have rounded-full class for consistent mobile design
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified ForgotPasswordPage and ResetPasswordPage responsive design. Key findings: 1) ForgotPasswordPage has mobile header with back button and 'Recuperar Contraseña' title. 2) Mail icon centered on mobile in w-14 h-14 container. 3) Email input has h-12 height on mobile. 4) Submit button has rounded-full class. 5) 'Volver al Login' link visible on mobile below form. 6) Desktop has 'Back to Login' link above form. 7) Footer hidden on mobile, visible on desktop. 8) ResetPasswordPage has 3 states: invalid token, form, success. 9) Invalid token state shows red AlertCircle icon and 'Solicitar nuevo enlace' button. 10) Form state has 2 password inputs with toggle visibility button. 11) 'Mínimo 8 caracteres' hint visible. 12) All responsive breakpoints working correctly.
